prompt: I'm debugging CDD_RegulatorManager.c and I see Get_pLMMFuncEnable used everywhere in #if CONFIG_LIGHTCONTROL guards. What is its configured value and what does it control?

assertions.text: Response correctly identifies the value as 0
Response identifies the sheet source (Parameters or LMM Parameters)
Response includes the human-readable description about LMM functionality
Response uses the param-lookup script (not grep or manual search)
